info.title: GitRepublic API
info.description: Nostr-based git server API with NIP-34 repository announcements. All endpoints use NIP-98 HTTP authentication.

NIP98.description: NIP-98 HTTP Authentication using Nostr events. The Authorization header should be: 'Nostr <base64-encoded-event-json>'

isRegistered.description: Whether this repository is registered with this server

get.description: Returns all registered repositories (repos with this domain in clone URLs) that the current user can view

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Git domain to filter registered repositories

get.description: Returns repositories that are cloned on this server

post.description: Manually trigger repository polling to provision new repos from Nostr announcements. This endpoint fetches NIP-34 repo announcements from relays and provisions repositories that list this server's domain in their clone URLs. The poll runs asynchronously and does not block the request.

get.summary: Get file content, list files, or get raw file
get.description: Get file content (JSON), list directory tree, or get raw file content. Use query parameters: 'action=tree' for directory listing, 'format=raw' for raw content, or omit both for JSON file content.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path relative to repository root (required for file content, optional for tree)

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Set to 'tree' to list files and directories

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format: 'raw' for raw file content, 'json' for JSON with metadata

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: Git reference (branch, tag, or commit)

parameters.name: recursive
parameters.description: For tree action: list files recursively

200.description: File content, directory listing, or raw file

post.description: Create a new file in a repository. Requires maintainer authentication.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path relative to repository root

put.description: Replace a file in a repository. Requires maintainer authentication.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path relative to repository root

patch.description: Partially update a file in a repository. Requires maintainer authentication.

delete.description: Delete a file from a repository. Requires maintainer authentication.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path relative to repository root

get.description: Get all branches in a repository
Get all tags in a repository
Get all maintainers for a repository

post.description: Add a maintainer to a repository. Requires owner authentication.

delete.description: Remove a maintainer from a repository. Requires owner authentication.

get.description: Get all pull requests for a repository (NIP-34 kind 1618)

post.description: Create a new pull request (NIP-34 kind 1618)

get.description: Get a specific pull request by ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Pull request ID (event ID)

patch.description: Update pull request status or commit

post.description: Merge a pull request into the target branch

get.description: Get all issues for a repository (NIP-34 kind 1621)

post.description: Create a new issue (NIP-34 kind 1621)

get.description: Search for repositories (type=repos) or code content (type=code). For code search, optionally filter by repository using the 'repo' parameter in format 'npub/repo'.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Search type: 'repos' for repository search, 'code' for code search

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: For code search: filter by repository in format 'npub/repo' (optional)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results (default: 20 for repos, 100 for code)

get.description: Get commit history for a repository

parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: Branch name

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Filter by file path

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of commits

get.description: Get README file content if available
Download repository as ZIP or tar.gz archive

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: Git reference to download

get.description: Check if repository is a fork and get original repo info

post.description: Create a fork of a repository. Requires unlimited access.

localOnly.description: Create a local-only fork (not published to Nostr)

403.description: Not authorized or resource limit exceeded

get.description: Get highlights (NIP-84) and comments (NIP-22) for a pull request

post.description: Create a highlight (NIP-84) or comment (NIP-22)

get.description: Get repository info including settings, maintainers, access, and verification. Use query parameter 'include' to specify what to include (settings, maintainers, access, verification, or 'all').

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sections to include: settings, maintainers, access, verification, or 'all'

put.description: Replace repository settings with a full update. Requires maintainer authentication.

patch.description: Partially update repository settings. Requires maintainer authentication.

delete.description: Delete a local repository clone. Requires owner or admin authentication.

get.description: Get ownership transfer history for a repository

post.description: Transfer repository ownership to another user. Requires current owner authentication.

get.description: Verify repository ownership by checking announcement file

post.description: Save repository announcement to the repository for verification. Requires maintainer authentication.

get.description: Validate repository announcement by checking if it exists in repo and on relays, and if signatures are valid

post.description: Clone a repository to the server. Requires unlimited access.

delete.description: Delete a local repository clone. Requires owner or admin authentication.

get.description: Get repository settings including description, visibility, and project relays

post.description: Update repository settings. Requires maintainer access. Supports visibility levels: public, unlisted, restricted, private. Unlisted and restricted require project-relay.

get.description: Check if current user can view the repository
Get the default branch name for a repository
Get branch protection rules for a repository

post.description: Update branch protection rules. Requires owner authentication.

get.description: Get all releases for a repository (NIP-34 kind 1642)

post.description: Create a new release (NIP-34 kind 1642). Requires maintainer authentication.

patch.description: Update a release. Requires maintainer authentication.

get.description: Get all patches for a repository (NIP-34 kind 1617)

post.description: Create a new patch (NIP-34 kind 1617)

patch.description: Update patch status (open, applied, closed, draft). Requires maintainer or patch author authentication.

post.description: Apply a patch to the repository. Requires maintainer authentication.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Patch ID (event ID)

get.description: Get all clone URLs for a repository, optionally with reachability status

parameters.name: includeReachability
parameters.description: Include reachability status for each URL

parameters.name: forceRefresh
parameters.description: Force refresh reachability cache

post.description: Check reachability of specific clone URLs

urls.description: Array of clone URLs to check

results.description: Map of URL to reachability result

get.description: Get cached reachability status for all clone URLs of a repository

parameters.name: forceRefresh
parameters.description: Force refresh reachability cache

results.description: Map of URL to reachability result

post.description: Test reachability of specific clone URLs

urls.description: Array of clone URLs to test

results.description: Map of URL to reachability result

get.description: Verify the signature of a commit using Nostr commit signature events (kind 1640)

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: Commit hash

get.description: Get diff between two git references

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Filter by file path

post.description: Verify user's access level (relay write proof). Requires NIP-98 authentication.

get.description: List repositories for a user (with privacy filtering)
Get the Tor hidden service .onion address for this server
Get aggregated issues and PRs from external git platforms. Requires unlimited access.
Get messaging preferences configuration status. Requires unlimited access.

post.description: Save messaging preferences. Requires unlimited access and signed proof event.

delete.description: Delete messaging preferences. Requires unlimited access.

get.description: Get safe summary of messaging preferences (no sensitive tokens). Requires unlimited access. Preferences are stored client-side in IndexedDB.
Get user profile (kind 0) and payment targets (kind 10133)
Get server configuration status without exposing sensitive values
Get pending ownership transfers for the authenticated user. Returns transfers where the user is the new owner.
